title: Assemble Go-Bag
description: A prepared bag you can grab in 60 seconds if you need to evacuate immediately.
items: Passport and copies of all IDs
Cash - US dollars or Euros, not just local currency. At least $500.
Phone charger, power bank, charging cable
List of emergency contacts - printed, not just in phone
Any critical medication - 7 day supply minimum
Keep this bag near your front door, not in a closet
